basic_details.job_title: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has officially announced the Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. TMC/AD/91/2026 on the official TMC website. Candidates up to 35 years of age with a Graduate Degree in Science or B.Pharm, along with a PG Diploma in Clinical Research and preferably one year of Clinical Research experience, can attend the walk-in recruitment process scheduled on 17 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and complete walk-in details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Science/ B. Pharm, PG Diploma in Clinical research, 1 Year Clinical Research Experience preferable
qualification.details: Graduate Degree in Science/ B. Pharm, PG Diploma in Clinical research is Mandatory, 1 Year Clinical Research Experience is preferable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Clinical Research Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Clinical Research Coordinator posts at Tata Memorial Centre is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree in Science/ B. Pharm and a PG Diploma in Clinical Research. One year of clinical research experience is preferable but not mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Clinical Research Coordinator position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Clinical Research Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to submit an online application form beforehand.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Tata Memorial Centre, Mumbai, Maharashtra, Pincode: 400012.
